Subject: What is Section 3 of the 14th Amendment?

Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

    <td id="Card7980798" class="OneColLarge">

                    <a id="Href7980798" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADU5XVUC47JGNGIYJPRSTMUDCFGFJYGFLUKDZO4YMPUMH6GVSXNNFCQPGLOHG3CUPHIG5CRRNAAIZ6G7A643ZXHQV3YZJE3KENYMADLVZUVB3SPSIWX3MMPLDHOCDXIU3POJ3I6KHHRIWTCR3Q4DEHR5JVOB2US74SA2CZVGBDRTTG3YULDPE7DB3IHA65ST2QEXVATEGBFK75TE6M4L2UIYZAZ4ZWADOJW6UWZ4OD3JU2ZZWUJQNH2H4MV4W6FYQTVYOPBWR4JK2ZJFSHRBEDV75P7Y&d=AIAADV4PDTYSQOZNJTLUTBAYQS223YBUEEGFYV5PR7SWM7SEETWI2PX776AJSMP57ILYYRAUE2PD57CE4MFSEHHJP5KRKKSAZJYOMO4IP6DCZVHFZQJJKUSQTILQP7JMY76GT32222TGU35ZRCA5KGJGG6H2BIVDFCWTLU4SWA66XICC6RRS376M&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">

                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td id="Title7980798" width="560" align="left" style="padding: 20px 20px 8px 20px; font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;color:#333333;font-weight:normal;text-decoration:none;">
                    <a id="Href7980798" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADLZKSXDIQ3H3SA34FU2DMC3MT75QHR7DHEJUS6WAKBWRSWPS3JQQIQPIGCLEAYGJC52QIN2ADF7O6PZKC6OTOWESWN7QTANS34TC2VHPXCBX25ABUVKLLCQRSOMXDQHOYGAO4Z2I2XJ4PMQH2WZYNEENEBCZ7W2PE7EUVHFU2V2YK5CHEBYEV4WU54MDDOFXWIVHXMHD4DRRBSKXSEOC2L3YFAJSIKHF7ZXDWCMHZ2F2AXPZNL3CAKOF4CQGH4RWROE4AORYEIFNMHBWLKPEJN5ESUI&d=AIAAD4JUPZVBXWH5ZJGN6P3Q7RUFGNMNXDUJKAC7KUO5GSF6AWICR6B5SZVHOXKMHJ6LZ5WAXRJPZTTOIONM7JSP44LDDHVXS6CSRZCUNP24IHHBDKROVFGNI6KTJHZFNR3TJ2WCWI4ATAEBUHFAEI2FZNEBUQNKVSKT3C4YAZ2OEXNMI3C6BWYG&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">
                        What is Section 3 of the 14th Amendment?
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td id="Summary7980798" align="left" style="padding: 0px 20px 11px 20px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3;">
                    <a id="Href7980798" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADVPVDLQSHNPVERDRJ56BUXN27OBKLSOUAF4VDAX3JTJTROCHBHVTVU7XZTZ5QTKS7R3AGPCN4LKCEL5T6DXT6MSGYTWAXXYFESPQZW5IK4F7YW2VYLG3RWBJYVN5PU6LKFQZJLYHBWTG6RPB52O72XZTYQQEY7KPNAIPEHP5IUX3PRWSCWWGDLGMIUIEC7SPYW2CBOGE7UNCZGYVTUOHD3X6MJKERYJOX735XNQHWSBZKPJEJVSKJ4OV2M24YYP6OVVVUE7C5CGJTWAQJ7RM4M5OQBA&d=AIAADN3625HGT2V5OHEJONWNSND2RZWOU6LGOWV2WQIYAU3VLLKZDNV6D7QXSTQGX4FGSLQHGSLRGGDWNHBX426IUOZDYGV2Q6PNJWYW435MSF7AFCP5QEYVNDSFZJ5XGDEI2JIWCSTKDOGGUJ2XPZ7T5XJZUO2KDB62Y5KAI25BCIT2ZOO6WBT6&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">
                            Learn more on Section 3 of the 14th Amendment after Colorado's Supreme Court removed Trump from its 2024 primary ballot over his…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td height="25" align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 0px 20px 15px 37px;">
                        <tr>
                            <td id="ProviderName7980798" height="28" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 18px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.2; border: none;color:#666666;">

<td id="Card7980800" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">

            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href7980800" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAD2WIDLAIRQ72CI5NT4HYIESJKHCICOVBUHM2752BWIVMJXPXBT7OHBWNC5XU2AKQOJICLP62OINXLSR2XYJHDSJRBR7DNTG2D7CAATDUS4AQXOQPNHVIXABP6SNJYKBR56GFIE36NY6S24HKBUFKSOQOL6REFTWZ3KMQQAFXWUDEYBWAOXCE&" target="_blank">

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title7980800" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href7980800" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAC4GVMFQVUAVUOVFW5POAJPWFV6CSBODG3EI5WT35OKNLMLRITAJIECXQCVKJ2FDOUWPHMP7C5GSZ7YWIMSDBT7H4NB6OQWQKA6SH3Q2BOZYQSMF5AKF7OJTNZVJMIGAP7YBSK2UXETZIEFNSCX5GY67BWGJEDKQC55FN72FAONXVR33G5GQT&" target="_blank">

                    </a>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>

                    </tr>
<tr>
    <td height="12"></td>
</tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td align="center" width="100%">
                            <table style="padding: 0; margin: 0;  max-width: 600px; max-height: 300px; vertical-align:middle;" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
                                <tr>
                                    
<td id="Card7980801" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
